---
title: "Home"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

# This is Lisa's website

![](https://media.giphy.com/media/drXGoW1iudhKw/giphy.gif)
This is an awesome website about data science 

Sometimes i use [google](https://www.google.com/) to do data science when I am stuck. 

If you want to include a picture to do this: 

![](images/ted.jpg)

If you'd like to learn more about this website, visit [this page](about.html)
